posts.author: danilamelas (Daniel Lamelas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Possibility to choose specific colors to column names, so those colors can be chosen in the calendar view, under the option “Color by Column name”.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to have the possibility to asisgn any color to columns in a board so I can select those colors in Calendar view in the option “Color by”. Right now, the colors that monday chooses when selecting the option “Color by Column name” are completely random. This would be very helpful when controlling types of events in a calendar under different dates when those dates are in differente columns.
For instance, when one column is named “Assembly date” and other column “Disassembly date”, choosing green for the assembly date and red for the disassembly date, making it possible to reply those colors in the calendar view when choosing the option of “Color by column name”.
